steps.title: Read the key graph points
steps.content:
The model starts at sea level, reaches its lowest point after $3$ hours, and returns to sea level after $6$ hours. The corresponding ordered pairs are
$$(0,0),\ (3,-12),\ (6,0)$$

steps.title: Compare the table entries
steps.content: The correct table must list exactly those three input-output pairs. Tables that repeat $x=0$ with different $y$-values or swap coordinates cannot represent this model.

steps.title: Select the matching table
steps.content: The table with $$(0,0),\ (3,-12),\ (6,0)$$ matches the graph. The answer is C.
